title: BEM-855 null commit diagnosis
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 15:01 (UTC+3)'
def exists(p): return Path(p).exists()
checks={
 'bem851_queue_exists': exists('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem851_dispatch_claude_after_bem850_fix.json'),
 'bem837_queue_exists': exists('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem837_claude_response_retry_dispatch.json'),
 'dispatch_results_dir_exists': exists('governance/workflow_dispatch_results'),
 'queue_processor_exists': exists('scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.sh'),
 'queue_commit_script_exists': exists('scripts/commit_workflow_dispatch_results.sh'),
 'codex_runner_exists': exists('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
}
results=[]
rd=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_results')
if rd.exists():
    results=[str(p) for p in sorted(rd.glob('*.status.json'))]
status='queue_files_present' if checks['bem851_queue_exists'] else 'queue_file_missing_after_null_commit'
next_action='if queue missing, recreate queue and force commit; if queue present, process/verify dispatch results'
state={'bem':'BEM-855','status':status,'checks':checks,'dispatch_results_tail':results[-20:],'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem855_diagnose_null_commit_after_851.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem855_diagnose_null_commit_after_851.md').write_text('# BEM-855 | Diagnose Null Commit After BEM-851 | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem855_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-855'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem855_diagnose_null_commit_after_851.json','governance/reports/bem855_diagnose_null_commit_after_851.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem855_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Diagnosed whether queue files and dispatch processor artifacts are present after repeated null-commit Codex results')
"""
